mapper.select: SELECT l.event_id, l.trade_id, l.event_type, l.event_time, l.operator_id, l.before_status, l.after_status, l.event_amount, l.event_rate, l.related_trade_id, l.remark, l.audit_snapshot, u.real_name as operator_name FROM fx_trade_lifecycle l LEFT JOIN fx_user u ON l.operator_id = u.user_id WHERE l.trade_id = #{tradeId} ORDER BY l.event_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fx_trade_lifecycle (trade_id, event_type, event_time, operator_id, before_status, after_status, event_amount, event_rate, related_trade_id, remark, audit_snapshot) VALUES (#{tradeId}, #{eventType}, NOW(), #{operatorId}, #{beforeStatus}, #{afterStatus}, #{eventAmount}, #{eventRate}, #{relatedTradeId}, #{remark}, #{auditSnapshot})
